messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

A vulnerability has been found in manikandan170890 php-form-builder-class and classified as problematic. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file PFBC/Element/Textarea.php of the component Textarea Handler. The manipulation of the argument value leads to cross site scripting. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The patch is named 74897993818d826595fd5857038e6703456a594a. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-218155.

A vulnerability in the php-form-builder-class by manikandan170890 has been identified, specifically affecting the Textarea Handler in the file PFBC/Element/Textarea.php. This vulnerability permits Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via manipulation of input values. The vulnerability is exploitable remotely, and details of the exploit have been made public. A patch, identified by the hash 74897993818d826595fd5857038e6703456a594a, is available to address this issue. The vulnerability is associated with the identifier VDB-218155.
